posts.author: rriker (Rusty Riker)
posts.cookedHtml:
TL;DR need rich text column and form entry

I’ve seen a couple threads asking about rich text for form descriptions and column headings. However, I think some people have mistakenly added comments about rich text in item data and form entries, so I’m creating a new thread/requst.

I’m manage the boards of a creative production dept at a large company where a few teams use Monday, but many of the teams we actually work with don’t need Monday, so the business has not given them accounts.

I just built a workflow to enable those non-Monday user to provide text descriptions for our website. Our overall workflow is to use subitems for the various deliverables for a project and my solution was to create a board for these specific web updates with an automation that creates an item on that board that mirrors back to the original subitem.

We’re then using SuperForm to generate an item specific link we can give to the non-users to use the update feature to fill in the request. It was working great until someone mentioned the submissions needed to allow rich text for italics, bold, and hyperlinks.

I searched high and low for other form solutions that allowed rich text that could maybe be pushed into Monday as HTML, but came up empty handed especially with the need to update an existing item. (I don’t have the capacity to make a custom workflow with Make or Zapier)

Instead, we now have the really clunky workaround of a word doc template hyperlinked in the SuperForm for the user to download, fill in, and then upload back to the form.

It would be SUPER helpful to have a column that can accept rich text and also have support for rich text entry on a form.

And if anyone has any other solutions that I might have missed, please let me know.
